description.id: Berdiri sebagai penyedia spesialis layanan dan peralatan process control serta instrumentasi.
description.en: Established as a specialized provider of process control, instrumentation services, and equipment.

description.id: Ditunjuk sebagai perwakilan Masoneilan Control Valve untuk Indonesia, mencapai tingkat instalasi 90% di seluruh jaringan kilang Pertamina.
description.en: Appointed Masoneilan Control Valve representative for Indonesia, achieving 90% installation across Pertamina's refinery network.

description.id: Ditunjuk sebagai sole agent resmi Ashcroft di Indonesia untuk rangkaian lengkap pressure & temperature gauges, switches, dan aksesori.
description.en: Appointed primary authorized sole agent for Ashcroft in Indonesia, providing the full range of pressure & temperature gauges, switches, and accessories.

description.id: Menjadi distributor resmi Yamari Industries Limited (Jepang) untuk temperature elements termasuk RTD, skin-type thermocouples, dan cabling instrumentasi.
description.en: Appointed authorized distributor for Yamari Industries Limited (Japan) for temperature elements including RTDs, skin-type thermocouples, and instrumentation cabling.

description.id: Mendirikan kerja sama produksi lokal dengan Ashcroft di Sentul, Jawa Barat, untuk perakitan pressure gauges di Indonesia.
description.en: Established a third-party agreement with Ashcroft to launch a local production assembly in Sentul, West Java, for Ashcroft pressure gauges in Indonesia.

description.id: Menambah Samil Industry Co. dan Autrol (Duon System) ke jaringan kemitraan Korea — flow elements, sight glass, level gauges, integrated metering, dan smart transmitters.
description.en: Added Samil Industry Co. and Autrol (Duon System) to our Korean partnerships — flow elements, sight glass, level gauges, integrated metering, and smart transmitters.

description.id: Memasuki teknologi pengolahan air canggih sebagai distributor Evoqua Chlorination Systems (kini bagian Xylem), bermitra dengan Kaitai Valve Group dan Miwival untuk solusi valve industrial.
description.en: Entered advanced water treatment as distributor of Evoqua Chlorination Systems (now part of Xylem), partnering with Kaitai Valve Group and Miwival for high-performance industrial valve solutions.

description.id: Bermitra dengan Huawei Digital Power untuk memimpin digitalisasi dan transisi energi pintar di sektor minyak dan gas Indonesia.
description.en: Partnered with Huawei Digital Power to lead digitalization and the smart energy transition within Indonesia's oil and gas sector.

description.id: Saat ini memperluas portofolio melalui kerja sama dengan penyedia ahli di teknologi valve, expansion joints, sistem elektrikal, dan gas detection.
description.en: Currently expanding our portfolio through upcoming agreements with expert providers in valve technology, expansion joints, electrical systems, and gas detection.
